Description: Free-text summary of project governance structures
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Describe your governance structure
**Helper Text:** Explain how the project is governed at different levels. You might include:
Who gave permission for the project (e.g., village assembly, district council, government agency)
Which organisations or actors are involved in implementation
Who is responsible for oversight, enforcement, or reporting
Whether any public–private or customary–formal partnerships are in place
**Hover Text:** We ask this to understand the decision-making structures, oversight responsibilities, and legitimacy of your project across local, regional, and national levels. This helps align stakeholder engagement and compliance processes.

Description: Overview of tenure situation
User-facing copy:

 **Helper Text:** Provide a summary of how land in the project area is owned, accessed, and governed - both formally and informally. Mention whether the land is privately held, community-managed, state-controlled, or governed by traditional/customary institutions.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand how land rights are structured and to identify any risks or gaps in access, use, or recognition.
